_comment: Committed source-of-truth for the pdf-tools registry entries. The live feed (demo/cli-audit/latest.json) and registry.db are gitignored generated state, so these entries do NOT travel with git. Apply them on any machine with `sh fleet-clis/pdf-tools/seed/apply.sh`. Two slugs share one binary because the feed loader binds one capability row per slug (a capability LIST crashes cli_audit_source.py:30-42); the split keeps the planner's side-effect gate meaningful (safe verbs unguarded, destructive require allow_side_effects). Path is resolved at apply time — do not hardcode it here.

entries.description: PDF manipulation (safe): split, compress, convert (Stirling-backed, local)
